title: plectranthus cuneatus
intro: Plectranthus cuneatus, also known as the Cape mint or mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and colds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus cuneatus include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and essential oils, which can be used in various forms such as topical creams, tinctures, or added to baths for relaxation.
